dialogos.texto_en: Oh, Uesugi-kun!\nPlease wait.
What's up?\nIs there something you wanted to check out?
I wanted to look at this shop.
(Is this...a glassware shop?)
Ah, is this Okinawa glassware?\nThis is also famous.
Yes, that's right.\nThey also have a good selection of accessories\nand small items.
I guess there's more to glass than what I had imagined.
(She's really absorbed...)
There's something about this glassware\nthat draws me in.\nIt should be cold, but it feels warm somehow...
(Does she like Okinawa glassware?\n Come to think of it, I'm sure there was...)
Hey, Itsuki,\nhave you ever heard of Ryukyu Glass Village?
Ah! Yes, I have!\nI saw it when I was planning our trip.
Let me look it up on my phone.
...Ah, there it is.\nIt seems that you can not only visit the workshops,\nbut also experience making glass and other items.
You can make it yourself?
Yeah.\nIt's difficult to do the entire process,\nso only some parts are available.
Hmm, making glass, huh?
Hey, Itsuki, if you want, would you like to go?\nI'm also interested in Ryukyu Glass now.
Yes!\nI'd love to go.
It wasn't on our itinerary,\nbut we don't have to stick to the plan.
Are we actually getting good at improvising?
Teehee!\nThen, let's go.
Yeah.
Sorry, everyone.\nWe'll keep this part a secret from now on, okay?
Because now...\nUesugi-kun, you're all mine.
